title: Timing Specification
description: A single timing parameter from the datasheet (setup time, hold time, propagation delay, etc.)

name.description: Timing parameter name as used in the datasheet (e.g. t_su, t_hd, t_r, t_pd)

description.description: Human-readable description (e.g. SDA setup time to SCL rising edge)

from_pin.description: Reference pin or signal for the start of the timing interval

to_pin.description: Reference pin or signal for the end of the timing interval

conditions.description: Conditions under which this timing applies (e.g. VDD=3.3V, CL=10pF)

interface.description: Interface this timing belongs to (e.g. I2C, SPI, UART)

remark.description: Free-form note about this timing parameter (e.g. only applies when CL > 100pF)
